blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 8 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for the damage/cleaning bond.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for the damage/cleaning bond.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a 'Damage/cleaning bond' as stated in the linked use case. However, there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms the enforcement or verification of this bond during the booking process. The evidence does mention a $500 damage deposit, but it does not clarify whether this is the same as the 'Damage/cleaning bond' or how it is managed, leading to an inconclusive result regarding the requirement's coverage.
